Handyman Wellington Professional Services

We Can Help
We now fully concentrate on small handyman jobs in the Wellington Area. We aim to be reliable, affordable and available
On this page are some of the jobs we can undertake so give us a ring if you need something fixed or repaired and see how we can help

Contact us today.

Handyman Wellington

call now 0204 009 0708

Click here to email me

×

HANDYFIX has no lead time at the moment so we are pretty much available right now We are now staffed by retired builders so you can be sure of getting someone who knows what they are doing We are a friendly team and affordable. We do have a min charge of $200 which will get you three hours and 60$ per hour after that. We also gaurantee not to be on the phone to other customers during this time so you get value for money We cover most of the Wellington district and can do all handyman tasks
Look forward to working with you



click to book a visit

What We Do

We provide Wellington handyman building and carpentry services for clients who don't have the time or inclination, quickly and at competitive rates. we pride ourselves on our workmanship and have the benefit of years of experience in the building industry. more

About Us

Thomas is a Licensed Building Practitioner with 25 years of experience both in New Zealand and overseas and has a wide range of skills. We also have ties with many different tradesman and therefore can offer a wide range of expertise. more

Where We Work

Handyman and full building and Home repair, carpentry, and installation services across most of the Wellington district . We are based in Island Bay and can give free estimates. more

Testimonials

Tim, Lyall Bay Wellington, November
“The handyman wellington did a great job on a new fence and deck. Apart from the excellent workmanship and attention to detail, they were reliable and organized and kept me fully informed every step of the way.”

PHIL: Island Bay Wellington,Feb
Hi Thomas, The new Garage that you built for me is great. Thankyou for the advise about the side door it works really well. I will be calling you when we want that new deck built. cheers mate
Sarah, Brooklyn Wellington, April
“Thomas put in a new shower for me. It was a relief to get rid of the old one that was leaking and starting to cause problems. So happy to have that all done and a great job too. Would highly recommend.” u

Fiona, CBD Wellington, July
“It isn’t easy finding a qualified builder to do those jobs you can’t quite manage yourself. Handyfix has done a few repair jobs for me and always been reliable and done work to a high standard. Thanks .”
WE FIX · WE BUILD · WE RENOVATE
